meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Aditya Dave, John Pepino: Productionizing AI Capabilities in Finance
meta.description:
Aditya Dave, Vice President of BlackRock, and John Pepino, Senior Software Engineer at BlackRock, discussed how AI solutions can streamline internal workflows at BlackRock, such as automated compliance checks or portfolio rebalancing.

At AI Dev 25 x NYC, they discussed why the financial services industry is at an inflection point where AI is a present-day necessity, used by banks, insurers, and asset managers to improve efficiency and client experience. 

----------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai
